endpoints.name: Get Groups
endpoints.description: Queries multiple group identities in the organization domain. Filtering, sorting and pagination are available. This call requires the role ROLE_ORG_READ.

endpoints.name: Create Group
endpoints.description: Creates a new organization group and adds it to the user domain. Member groups and member users must be in the organization. This call requires the role ROLE_ORG_WRITE.

endpoints.name: Get Group
endpoints.description: Queries group details in the organization domain. This call requires the role ROLE_ORG_READ.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{GROUPKEY}} with a real groupkey.

endpoints.name: Replace Group
endpoints.description: Updates an existing group. The request must include the full group definition. To modify one or more values without sending the full definition, see "Update Group". Member groups and member users must be in the organization. This call requires the role ROLE_ORG_WRITE.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{GROUPKEY}} with a real groupkey.

endpoints.name: Delete Group
endpoints.description: Deletes a group from the organization (but not from the account). The group must be in the organization. This call requires the role ROLE_ORG_WRITE.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{GROUPKEY}} with a real groupkey.

endpoints.name: Update Group
endpoints.description: Updates one or more values of an existing group without sending the full definition. Member groups and member users must be in the organization. This call requires the role ROLE_ORG_WRITE.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{GROUPKEY}} with a real groupkey.

endpoints.name: Get User Schema
endpoints.description: Queries the user schema. The user schema is defined in SCIM Core Schema (http://www.simplecloud.info/specs/draft-scim-core-schema-01.html#resource-schema).

endpoints.name: Get Service Provider Configurations
endpoints.description: Queries service provider configurations. The service provider configurations are defined in SCIM Core Schema (http://www.simplecloud.info/specs/draft-scim-core-schema-01.html#anchor6). This call returns a description, a documentationURL, name, and specURL.

endpoints.name: Get Users
endpoints.description: Queries multiple user identities in the organization domain. Filtering is available.

endpoints.name: Create User
endpoints.description: Creates a new organization user and adds them to the user domain. The user email domain must match an existing organization email domain.

endpoints.name: Get Current User
endpoints.description: Queries the identity of the current authenticated user.

endpoints.name: Replace Current User
endpoints.description: Changes the current authenticated user's displayName, locale, timezone, username and password. The request must include the full user definition (to modify one or more values without sending the full definition, see Update User). The replaced user email domain must be an existing organization email domain.

endpoints.name: Update Current User
endpoints.description: Changes a limited set (or all if you choose) of the current authenticated user's data. The updated user email domain must be an existing organization email domain.

endpoints.name: Get User
endpoints.description: Queries user identity in the organization domain.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{USERKEY}} with a real userkey.

endpoints.name: Replace User
endpoints.description: Changes an existing user's displayName, locale, timezone, username and password. The request must include the full user definition (to modify one or more values without sending the full definition, see Update User). The replaced user email domain must be an existing organization email domain.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{USERKEY}} with a real userkey.

endpoints.name: Delete User
endpoints.description: Deletes a user from the organization (but not from the account).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{USERKEY}} with a real userkey.

endpoints.name: Update User
endpoints.description: Changes a limited set (or all if you choose) of the user's data. The updated user email domain must be an existing organization email domain.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{USERKEY}} with a real userkey.
